title: alatiglossum longipes
intro: Alatiglossum longipes is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Australia and is also known as the Australian mint bush due to its mint-like fragrance. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The leaves of Alatiglossum longipes can be used to make a herbal tea or infused oil, which can be used to treat various health issues, including colds, sore throats, and skin irritations.
